# DNIe para Mac

> DNIe para Mac is an unofficial macOS app to read, authenticate with, and sign documents using the Spanish electronic national ID card (DNIe / Documento Nacional de Identidad electrónico). All processing happens on-device — the PIN and personal data never leave the Mac. The app's interface is available in Spanish, Catalan, Basque and Galician; this website (macdnie.com) is published in all five languages: Spanish (root), English (/en/), Catalan (/ca/), Basque (/eu/) and Galician (/gl/). Publisher: nexoapex. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by the Spanish government.

## What DNIe para Mac does
- Reads the DNIe's personal data and photo, entirely on-device.
- Signs you in to Spanish e-government sites (sedes electrónicas) from Safari, Chrome, Edge and Firefox.
- Signs documents in PAdES (PDF), CAdES and XAdES formats, with an RFC-3161 timestamp; also validates already-signed documents.
- Interoperable with AutoFirma: it complements AutoFirma and does not replace it by force.
- Sign-in uses macOS's native integration (CryptoTokenKit) in Safari, Chrome and Edge; for Firefox, DNIe para Mac includes its own PKCS#11 module in the direct-download edition (not the App Store build).

## Key facts
- Requires macOS 13 or later (Intel or Apple Silicon) and a USB contact card reader (CCID). DNIe 3.0/4.0 add NFC but are used through the reader.
- No telemetry in the app. This website uses optional, consent-gated Google Analytics — off until you accept it in the cookie banner.
- Detects the DNIe generation (1.0 to 4.0) and gives in-app guidance for a blocked PIN or expired certificates.
- The DNIe has no PUK: a blocked PIN can only be reset in person at a police DNIe Update Point (PAD) with a fingerprint, with no appointment. Certificates (valid ~2 years) are renewed the same way, for free; there is no online renewal.
- Pricing: €10 per year, or €150 for a lifetime license, via native Apple In-App Purchase.
- Status: in review on the Mac App Store; not yet available to download.

## Pages
Each page below is published in five languages: Spanish (es, language of record), English (en), Catalan (ca), Basque (eu), Galician (gl).

- Home — overview, features, pricing and FAQ: [es](https://macdnie.com/) · [en](https://macdnie.com/en/) · [ca](https://macdnie.com/ca/) · [eu](https://macdnie.com/eu/) · [gl](https://macdnie.com/gl/)
- Privacy policy: [es](https://macdnie.com/privacidad.html) · [en](https://macdnie.com/en/privacy.html) · [ca](https://macdnie.com/ca/privadesa.html) · [eu](https://macdnie.com/eu/pribatutasun-politika.html) · [gl](https://macdnie.com/gl/privacidade.html)
- Terms of use: [es](https://macdnie.com/condiciones.html) · [en](https://macdnie.com/en/terms.html) · [ca](https://macdnie.com/ca/condicions.html) · [eu](https://macdnie.com/eu/erabilera-baldintzak.html) · [gl](https://macdnie.com/gl/condicions.html)
- Blocked PIN / expired certificate guide — the DNIe has no PUK; unblocking and renewal only happen in person, at a PAD, free, no appointment: [es](https://macdnie.com/pin-bloqueado.html) · [en](https://macdnie.com/en/dnie-pin-blocked.html) · [ca](https://macdnie.com/ca/pin-bloquejat.html) · [eu](https://macdnie.com/eu/pin-blokeatua.html) · [gl](https://macdnie.com/gl/pin-bloqueado.html)
- AutoFirma on Mac — what AutoFirma is, when it's still needed, and how DNIe para Mac complements it: [es](https://macdnie.com/autofirma-mac.html) · [en](https://macdnie.com/en/autofirma-mac.html) · [ca](https://macdnie.com/ca/autofirma-mac.html) · [eu](https://macdnie.com/eu/autofirma-mac.html) · [gl](https://macdnie.com/gl/autofirma-mac.html)
- Glossary — DNIe and e-signature terms (PAdES, CAdES, XAdES, PKCS#11, CWA 14890, OCSP, PAD, sede electrónica, AutoFirma): [es](https://macdnie.com/glosario.html) · [en](https://macdnie.com/en/dnie-glossary.html) · [ca](https://macdnie.com/ca/glossari.html) · [eu](https://macdnie.com/eu/glosarioa.html) · [gl](https://macdnie.com/gl/glosario.html)
